channel.title: codium on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in codium on Notities

item.title: Installeer de editor VSCodium op Ubuntu Linux
item.description: $ wget -qO - https://gitlab.com/paulcarroty/vscodium-deb-rpm-repo/raw/master/pub.gpg | sudo apt-key add - $ sudo echo ‘deb https://vscodium.c7.ee/debs/ vscodium main’ | sudo tee –append /etc/apt/sources.list.d/vscodium.list $ sudo apt update $ sudo apt install codium
